revision.comment: added a parameter "delete-empty". when is equals yes, than it will remove the {{[[Template:Possibly empty category|Possibly empty category]]}} template
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Category.svg|80px|alt=|link=]] | text =
This is a [[:Category:Tracking categories|tracking category]].
''It is used to build and maintain lists of pages—primarily for the sake of the lists themselves and their use in article and category maintenance. It is not part of the '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization|encyclopedia's categorization scheme]]'''.''{{#if:{{{text|}}}|
{{{text|}}}}}__HIDDENCAT__ {{Hidden begin|title=More information:|style=width:95%;margin:auto;font-size:100%}} * This category is '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Hiding categories|hidden]]''' on its [[:Category:Hidden categories|member pages]]—unless the corresponding [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|user preference]] (Appearance → Show hidden categories) is set. * These categories are used to track, build and organize lists of pages needing "attention ''en masse''" (for example, pages using deprecated syntax), or that may need to be edited at someone's earliest convenience. * These categories also serve to aggregate members of several lists or sub-categories into a larger, more efficient list (''discriminated by classifications''). * Typically, tracking categories are automatically populated by templates invoked in pages or by the MediaWiki software (see [[Special:TrackingCategories]] for an overview of the latter). {{Hidden end}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{container}}}|yes|{{Cmbox | type = notice | text = This is a '''[[:Category:Container categories|container category]]'''. Due to its scope, it should contain ''only'' '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Subcategorization|subcategories]]'''. {{Category other|}}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}

|}} }} {{#if: {{{delete-empty|}}} | {{#ifeq: {{{delete-empty}}} | yes | | {{Possibly empty category}} }} | {{Possibly empty category}} }} {{Single namespace|category|{{#ifeq:{{{category|}}}|no||{{{category| __NOGALLERY__}}}}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Container categories]] [[Category:Tracking categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Cmbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Category.svg|80px|alt=|link=]] | text =
This is a [[:Category:Tracking categories|tracking category]].
''It is used to build and maintain lists of pages—primarily for the sake of the lists themselves and their use in article and category maintenance. It is not part of the '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization|encyclopedia's categorization scheme]]'''.''{{#if:{{{text|}}}|
{{{text|}}}}}__HIDDENCAT__ {{Hidden begin|title=More information:|style=width:95%;margin:auto;font-size:100%}} * This category is '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Hiding categories|hidden]]''' on its [[:Category:Hidden categories|member pages]]—unless the corresponding [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|user preference]] (Appearance → Show hidden categories) is set. * These categories are used to track, build and organize lists of pages needing "attention ''en masse''" (for example, pages using deprecated syntax), or that may need to be edited at someone's earliest convenience. * These categories also serve to aggregate members of several lists or sub-categories into a larger, more efficient list (''discriminated by classifications''). * Typically, tracking categories are automatically populated by templates invoked in pages or by the MediaWiki software (see [[Special:TrackingCategories]] for an overview of the latter). {{Hidden end}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{container}}}|yes|{{Cmbox | type = notice | text = This is a '''[[:Category:Container categories|container category]]'''. Due to its scope, it should contain ''only'' '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Subcategorization|subcategories]]'''. {{Category other|}}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|

{{{1}}}

|}} }} {{#if: {{{delete-empty|}}} | {{#ifeq: {{{delete-empty}}} | yes | | {{Possibly empty category}} }} | {{Possibly empty category}} }} {{Single namespace|category|{{#ifeq:{{{category|}}}|no||{{{category| __NOGALLERY__}}}}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Container categories]] [[Category:Tracking categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
